prestazioni: Engine: Replace the stock **C1J-784** (1.4L turbocharged inline-4) with a **C7K-700** (2.0L turbocharged inline-4 from the Renault 21 Turbo) using a **Garrett GT2860RS-5** turbocharger, paired with a **Tial MV-R 44mm** external wastegate and a **GReddy Type-S** intercooler. Port and polish the **Renault 807-10** cylinder head with **Ferrea F5000** valves and **Supertech** valve springs for 8,500 RPM capability.

Drivetrain: Install a **Hewland FT200** 5-speed dogbox with **Quaife ATB differential** and **Peloquin LSD** for the rear axle. Replace the stock driveshafts with **GKN Lobro** CV joints and **Samco Sport** silicone hoses for the cooling system to handle increased power.

Suspension & Brakes: Fit **Ohlins Road & Track DFV** coilovers with **Eibach ERS** springs (8kg/mm front, 10kg/mm rear) and **SuperPro** bushings. Upgrade to **Brembo GT 4-piston calipers** with **330mm slotted rotors** (front) and **280mm rotors** (rear), paired with **Ferodo DS2500** pads and **Goodridge G-Stop** braided lines.
estetica: Body: Install a **Liberty Walk LB-R5T** widebody kit with **carbon fiber fender flares** and a **custom aluminum rear diffuser** by **Aeroform**. Replace the stock hood with a **Seibon carbon fiber** unit featuring a **functional NACA duct** for the intercooler.

Aero: Add a **Voltex Type-3** rear wing with **adjustable carbon fiber endplates** and **custom aluminum side skirts** by **Rieger Tuning**. Paint the car in **Renault Sport Blue (418)** with **3M Matte Black** accents and **Oracle Lighting** RGB underglow.

Interior: Replace the stock seats with **Recaro Pole Position** buckets wrapped in **Alcantara (Stealth Grey)** with **Schroth Profi II-6** harnesses. Install a **Momo Prototipo** steering wheel on a **NRG Innovations** quick-release hub and a **Motec C127** dash display with **AEM X-Series** gauges.
